full_text:
Chen Qun 陳群
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Qun (陳群). Served Cao Rui. Captain under Sima Yi in his campaign against Gongsun Yuan. Chen Qun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
